text: Did you know that your brain's connections are shaped by activity? This idea, known as the Hebbian principle, states that neurons that fire together, wire together. When you learn something new, those neurons connect more strongly. Recent studies suggest this process may enhance memory retention and skill acquisition. So, practicing a skill repeatedly can literally rewire your brain! Curious about how you can harness this? Follow for more brain science tips!
